# DORIXÉ

> DORIXÉ is an eco-friendly household cleaning marketplace connecting customers with identity-verified, eco-conscious cleaning professionals who use eco-friendly products. Operating in the EU and US and positioned globally.

## What DORIXÉ offers
- Book trusted **eco-friendly cleaners** by postcode — regular cleaning, deep cleaning, move-in/move-out, office cleaning, laundry, and window cleaning.
- **Cleaner-set hourly rates** shown transparently (e.g. €X/hr). The customer pays the cleaner's quoted rate; the platform deducts a small commission from the cleaner's payout — no fee added on top.
- **Identity-verified** providers with an eco score.
- **Secure payment**: cards are pre-authorised at booking and only charged when the job is marked complete. Tiered, fair cancellation refunds.
- **No long-term contract** — book a one-off clean or a recurring (weekly/biweekly/monthly) schedule, cancel anytime.
- Two-way reviews (customers and cleaners rate each other) and real-time booking updates.
- A bidding marketplace: post a job and receive bids from local eco cleaners.
- An **Eco-store**: a curated list of recommended eco-friendly cleaning products and business starter packs, with links to trusted brands (affiliate links).

## Why eco
DORIXÉ providers use eco-friendly cleaning products — gentler on your home, pets, and the environment. Tagline: "Clean Home. Green Future."

## Key pages
- Find cleaners: /browse
- How it works: /how-it-works
- Pricing & fees: /pricing
- Sustainability: /sustainability
- Become a cleaner: /become-a-cleaner
- Affiliate programme: /affiliate
- Eco-store (recommended products & starter packs): /eco-store
- Blog (eco-cleaning guides & tips): /blog

## Who it's for
Households and offices looking for reliable, environmentally responsible cleaning with transparent pricing and no lock-in contracts.
